name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline, installable on **5 platforms** — Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — no new manifest needed), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental `.antigravity/plugin.json` mirroring the Gemini-CLI-extensions importer format). Single `skills/` directory shared across all platforms. **v3.12.0** is the install-surface expansion. **v3.11.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests. **v3.10.0** added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance for the .docx output (EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, applicable 2 Aug 2026): new --c2pa-sign flag on scripts/generate-docx.py with .docx-embed-if-supported + verifiable .c2pa.json sidecar fallback. Plus May 2026 AEO reality update in Phase 6 SEO/GEO optimizer (Google AI Overviews 55% prevalence + 61% organic CTR drop, citation source skew by engine, LLMs.txt companion standard, Profound/Otterly/Conductor measurement integration references). v3.9.6 reflected Google's March 2026 core update demoting FAQ/HowTo/Review schema on non-primary pages. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs.
